name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M11212 [Premium Enhanced Version]. Leather is genuine Italian A-grade diamond quilted leather from the authorized factory. Counter-synced chip technology. Focuses on quality, full steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, A-grade high-quality output, fully upgraded again. Photos match the product. Full packaging set included. Dimensions: 16*10*7.5CM
